company_description: Verkada is a cloud-based enterprise security platform using ML for video intelligence.
Writer is an enterprise generative AI platform for business content and workflows.
Typeface is an enterprise AI content generation platform for brand-safe content.
Jasper is an AI content creation platform for marketing teams.
Copy.ai is an AI-powered go-to-market platform for sales and marketing workflows.
Moveworks is an AI employee support platform using LLMs to resolve IT and HR requests.
Forethought builds AI-powered customer support tools using generative AI.
Cresta uses AI to provide real-time guidance and automation for contact center agents.
Kore.ai is an enterprise conversational AI platform for virtual assistants and agents.
Unstructured provides data preprocessing infrastructure for RAG and LLM pipelines.
Gretel.ai provides synthetic data generation for privacy-safe AI training.
Snorkel AI helps enterprises build and refine training data for production ML.
Arize AI is an ML observability platform for monitoring model performance in production.
WhyLabs is an AI observability platform for monitoring ML models and data pipelines.
Evidently AI is an open-source ML monitoring and testing library for production ML.
Superwise is an enterprise ML monitoring platform for detecting model drift.
Fiddler AI is an enterprise model performance management platform.
Aporia provides real-time guardrails and observability for LLM applications.
Lightly is a self-supervised learning platform for curating computer vision training data.
Deci builds deep learning optimization tools for faster and cheaper inference.

Modular builds next-generation AI infrastructure and a unified compute platform.
VoltaML accelerates AI inference using advanced compilation and optimization techniques.

dbt Labs builds the dbt data transformation framework now integrating AI-driven analytics.

Prefect is a workflow orchestration platform for ML and data pipelines.
